name: Maki Zenin
description:
Emperor user x Thief Maki

A request someone gave please give me moreeeee

It’s a little bit corny sorry bout that

I tried to leave what the emperor did vague so that it would be easier for many different types of characters to use if that makes sense.

ALSO I used the word emperor but is is still any pov I just didn’t know a better word, if anyone knows a better word for me to use please let me know <3
creator: Wubadubaduba
